regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces acute military pressure from sustained U.S. and Israeli strikes targeting infrastructure, concurrent with a leadership succession following Supreme Leader Khamenei's death on February 28. A 10-day diplomatic pause on power plant strikes offers a narrow window for negotiation, but military operations continue elsewhere.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Israeli and U.S. strikes targeted Iranian military infrastructure across multiple cities (Tehran, Isfahan, Shiraz, Bandar Abbas, Mashhad) on March 27, with weapons production facilities struck and Iranian missiles reaching near Dimona.
